framework.name: DIF Trusted AI Agents WG — DIDs+VCs for Agent Auth
framework.description: DIF's working group proposes combining Decentralised Identifiers (DIDs) with Verifiable Credentials (VCs) to create hierarchical identity with delegation chains, dynamic capabilities, cross-boundary trust, and audit trails. VCs can include delegation chains showing authority flow from human→platform→agent→sub-agent.
framework.raw_quote: They can include delegation chains showing how authority flows from human to platform to agent to sub-agent. They support selective disclosure... And crucially, they have independent lifecycles from identity, meaning capabilities can be issued and revoked separately from the agent's core identity.
